primary_navigation.label: Evidence Gate
primary_navigation.description: The central hub for curating, validating, and recording market evidence.

primary_navigation.label: Decision Timeline
primary_navigation.description: A visual narrative of the decision-making process, from evidence to action.

primary_navigation.label: Risk Dashboard
primary_navigation.description: Real-time risk metrics and scenario analysis for each decision.

primary_navigation.label: Audit Trail
primary_navigation.description: Immutable record of all evidence, challenges, and approvals.

primary_navigation.label: User Profile
primary_navigation.description: Personalized settings, preferences, and access controls.

secondary_navigation.label: Evidence Library
secondary_navigation.description: Curated collection of market data, reports, and analysis.

secondary_navigation.label: Challenge Queue
secondary_navigation.description: Pending evidence reviews and validation requests.

secondary_navigation.label: Decision Templates
secondary_navigation.description: Reusable frameworks for structuring and documenting decisions.

secondary_navigation.label: Market Insights
secondary_navigation.description: Aggregated intelligence and trend analysis from the community.

content_areas.label: Evidence Filtering
content_areas.description: Tools and criteria for selecting and prioritizing market evidence.

content_areas.label: Evidence Validation
content_areas.description: Process for reviewing, challenging, and approving evidence.

content_areas.label: Decision Recording
content_areas.description: Methods for documenting and storing decisions with full transparency.

content_areas.label: Risk Assessment
content_areas.description: Quantitative and qualitative tools for evaluating risk exposure.

content_areas.label: User Control Panel
content_areas.description: Customization and access management for user experience and data.

guidelines: Ensure all interactive elements are keyboard-navigable.
Provide alt text for all visual content, including 3D models.
Support screen reader compatibility for 3D narrative components.
Offer adjustable color contrast and font sizes.
Ensure all user actions are logged and accessible via audit trail.

branding.tagline: Market conviction becomes credible when evidence is filtered, challenged, approved and recorded transparently.
